issues.description: Trigger is wrong. This is an event card with [Main] effect, not OnPlay. Event cards should use 'Activated' trigger for [Main] timing.
PlayFromHand action is incomplete. The effect allows playing from 'hand or trash', but the action only covers playing from hand. Need to add ability to play from trash as well.

RemoveLife action is incorrect. The effect says 'trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card', which means reducing life to exactly 1, not removing 1 life. The action should specify reducing to 1 life card total.
Spurious Trigger effect. The card has no [Trigger] effect in the official text, but effects[1] defines a Trigger with DrawCard and TrashFromHand actions that don't exist on this card.
